utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: Phoebe ! Rachel ! It is Monica ! I wonder what you could possibly need me for on such short notice ! Oh .

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: Oh Monica , we are so sorry .

emotion_cause.span: 7_it took us so long to get you here that they ... they had to leave .

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: Well first , for forgetting to throw you a bridal shower .

emotion_cause.span: 4_forgetting to throw you a bridal shower .

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: And then for forgetting to invite you to it .

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: Well , we called everyone in your phone book and a bunch of people came , but it took us so long to get you here that they ... they had to leave .

emotion_cause.span: 7_it took us so long to get you here that they ... they had to leave .

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: Yeah , we wanted to throw you a big surprise and a great shower , and now you do not have either .

emotion_cause.span: 8_we wanted to throw you a big surprise and a great shower , and now you do not have either .

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: Well no , wait a minute , that is not true !

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: No , what you did was really sweet .

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: And it kinda works out for the best .

emotion_cause.span: 13_it kinda works out for the best .

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: What do you , what do you mean ?

emotion_cause.span: 13_it kinda works out for the best .

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: Well now , I get to spend my shower with the only people I really love !

emotion_cause.span: 15_now , I get to spend my shower with the only people I really love !

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: I mean , I get all those presents without having to talk to people I do not even like !

emotion_cause.span: 16_I get all those presents without having to talk to people I do not even like !
16_I get all those presents without having to talk to people I do not even like !
